title: Student — Dashboard
content:
Overview


The Dashboard is the first page students see after logging in. It gives a quick summary of their academic activity and provides shortcuts to the most-used sections of the portal.



Stats Grid


Four stat cards appear at the top of the dashboard:


  • Enrolled Courses: Number of subjects the student is currently enrolled in through the school
  • Average Grade: Overall average across all subjects (displays as a percentage)
  • Quizzes Completed: Total number of self-study quizzes the student has taken
  • Study Days: Number of days the student has been active on the platform

These stats update automatically as the student uses the platform.



Recent Activity


The Recent Activity card shows a timeline of the student's latest actions on the platform. This may include:


  • Courses enrolled in
  • Quizzes completed
  • Assignments viewed
  • Study materials accessed

Each activity item shows an icon indicating the type of action, a description, and a timestamp. If there is no recent activity, a placeholder message encourages the student to start learning.



Quick Access


Three shortcut buttons provide fast navigation to the most-used pages:


  • Continue Learning: Opens the My Courses page where enrolled courses and study resources are listed
  • Study Materials: Opens the Study Materials page with the scientific calculator, formula sheets, and unit converter
  • View Progress: Opens the Progress page showing course progress and overall performance


Navigation


The sidebar menu provides access to all pages:


  • Dashboard: This page
  • My Courses: Enrolled school courses with study resources
  • All Courses: Browse all available self-study courses and enroll in new ones
  • Study Materials: Calculator, formula sheets, unit converter
  • Assignments: View assignments sent by teachers
  • Enrolment: Browse teacher subjects and submit enrolment requests
  • My Grades: View grades and teacher comments by term
  • Announcements: Read school-wide announcements
  • Calendar: View school events and important dates
  • Progress: Track course progress and overall performance
  • Settings: Profile, password, 2FA, and notification preferences


Notification Bell


A notification bell icon appears in the top-right corner of the portal. It shows a red badge with the count of unread notifications. Clicking the bell opens a dropdown with recent notifications such as:


  • New assignments from teachers
  • Enrolment status updates (approved or rejected)
  • New grades posted
  • School announcements

Notifications can be cleared individually or all at once using the "Clear all" button.



Key Talking Points for Agents


  • "Your dashboard stats update automatically — enrolled courses, average grade, quizzes completed, and study days."
  • "Use the Quick Access buttons to jump straight to your courses, study materials, or progress."
  • "The notification bell in the top-right corner shows new assignments, grade updates, and announcements."
  • "If your stats seem off, try refreshing the page — they're calculated from your latest activity."
